creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Sun Apr 28 21:38:56 2013
New Revision: 316755
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316755

Log:
  - Fix poirtdocs
  
  PR:		ports/177035
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/games/bubble-chains/Makefile
  head/games/bubble-chains/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/bubble-chains/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/bubble-chains/Makefile	Sun Apr 28 21:23:56 2013	(r316754)
+++ head/games/bubble-chains/Makefile	Sun Apr 28 21:38:56 2013	(r316755)
@@ -27,8 +27,6 @@ USE_QT4=	moc_build qmake_build rcc_build
 
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
-
 PORTDOCS=	README
 
 DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Bubble Chains" "${COMMENT}" \
@@ -37,12 +35,6 @@ DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Bubble Chains" "${COMME
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS=""
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS="@comment "
-.endif
-
 P7ZIP_CMD=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/7z
 P7ZIP_ARGS=	x -o${WRKDIR}
 

Modified: head/games/bubble-chains/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/games/bubble-chains/pkg-plist	Sun Apr 28 21:23:56 2013	(r316754)
+++ head/games/bubble-chains/pkg-plist	Sun Apr 28 21:38:56 2013	(r316755)
@@ -67,10 +67,8 @@ bin/bubble-chains
 %%DATADIR%%/data/tools/random.png
 %%DATADIR%%/data/tools/star.png
 %%DATADIR%%/data/tools/twins.png
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
 share/pixmaps/bubble-chains.ico
 share/pixmaps/bubble-chains.png
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/data/tools
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/data/sounds
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/data/schemes/default
